prompt: Create an ultra-realistic luxury editorial portrait in a vertical 4:5 frame of a young Black man facing the camera from the chest up. He has a calm, confident, neutral expression, direct eye contact, smooth dark brown skin, short neatly trimmed black hair, and refined studio portrait retouching that still preserves natural skin texture. Dress him in exactly 4 visible wardrobe elements: a voluminous gray fur coat with a wide plush collar draped over the shoulders, a crisp white dress shirt, a black paisley silk tie, and a black wristwatch with a round dark dial on the wrist of the hand gripping the coat lapel. Pose: one hand lightly clutches the fur collar near the chest while the other arm remains lower and mostly out of frame, creating a poised high-fashion stance. Use dramatic luxury studio lighting with soft frontal key light, subtle rim highlights along the fur, gentle shadows on the face, and crisp detail in the coat fibers. Background: dark charcoal-gray mottled studio backdrop with a smoky painted texture and no props. Style: photorealistic high-fashion magazine cover aesthetic, premium editorial portrait, sharp eyes, realistic fabric and fur texture, shallow depth of field, rich contrast, elegant color grading, no text, no watermark, no extra accessories, no distorted hands.
promptEn: Create an ultra-realistic luxury editorial portrait in a vertical 4:5 frame of a young Black man facing the camera from the chest up. He has a calm, confident, neutral expression, direct eye contact, smooth dark brown skin, short neatly trimmed black hair, and refined studio portrait retouching that still preserves natural skin texture. Dress him in exactly 4 visible wardrobe elements: a voluminous gray fur coat with a wide plush collar draped over the shoulders, a crisp white dress shirt, a black paisley silk tie, and a black wristwatch with a round dark dial on the wrist of the hand gripping the coat lapel. Pose: one hand lightly clutches the fur collar near the chest while the other arm remains lower and mostly out of frame, creating a poised high-fashion stance. Use dramatic luxury studio lighting with soft frontal key light, subtle rim highlights along the fur, gentle shadows on the face, and crisp detail in the coat fibers. promptZh: 创作一张超写实奢华时尚杂志肖像，采用 4:5 竖构图，拍摄 一位年轻黑人男性 的胸部以上特写，正对镜头。他表情冷静、自信且中性，直视镜头，拥有光滑的深棕色皮肤和修剪整齐的短黑发，采用精致的影棚肖像修图风格，同时保留自然的皮肤纹理。服装要求包含 4 个清晰可见的元素：肩上披着一件蓬松的灰色皮草大衣，配有宽大的毛绒领口；内搭一件挺括的白色衬衫；系一条黑色佩斯利花纹丝绸领带；手腕上佩戴一块黑色圆形表盘的手表，手正抓着大衣翻领。姿势：一只手轻轻抓着胸前的皮草领口，另一只手臂保持在下方且大部分处于画框之外，呈现出一种从容的高级时尚姿态。光影采用戏剧性的奢华影棚布光，配以柔和的正面主光、皮草边缘的微妙轮廓光、面部柔和的阴影，以及清晰的皮草纤维细节。背景：深炭灰色斑驳影棚背景，带有烟雾状的涂抹纹理，无任何道具。风格：照片级写实的高级时尚杂志封面美学，顶级编辑肖像，眼神锐利，布料与皮草纹理真实，浅景深，对比度丰富，优雅的调色，无文字，无水印，无额外配饰，无手部畸变。
